message:
chore(perf): refresh budget reports — binary_size_release now passes at 21.3 MB (threshold 22 MB)

Regenerated perf budget reports after release binary became available:
- binary_size_release: NO_DATA → PASS (21.3 MB vs 22 MB threshold)
- idle_memory_rss: updated actual from 3.8 to 4.5 MB (still well within 50 MB)
- sustained_load_rss_growth: minor measurement variance (0.13% → 0.14%)
- CI-enforced with data: 1 → 2, ci_no_data: 7 → 6
- Data contract failures: 8 → 7 (binary_size artifact no longer missing)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
